zh.lifeSummary: 當Wiltrude von Calw於1045年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧奧波陶努斯可萊斯艾普斯坦時，她的父親Graf Adalbert III von Calw22歲，母親Wiltrud von Niederlothringen15歲。她於1069年與Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau在德國海藍-普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1112年7月17日在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wiltrude von Calw于1045年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧奧波陶努斯可萊斯艾普斯坦时，她的父亲Graf Adalbert III von Calw22岁，母亲Wiltrud von Niederlothringen15岁。她于1069年与Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau在德国海藍-普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1112年7月17日在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Calw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a habitational name from Calke in Derbyshire ‘(place on) the chalk or limestone’, from Old English (Anglian) calc.

variants.name: Kalk
meanings: German and Dutch: metonymic occupational name for a lime burner, from Middle High German kalc ‘lime’ (a loanword from Latin calx), Middle Dutch calk. Lime is a white calcium oxide obtained by heating limestone (see Kalkbrenner ).

variants.name: Caulk
meanings: English (Norfolk): possibly a variant of   Calk  .

en.lifeSummary: When Wiltrude von Calw was born in 1045, in Eppstein, Obertaunuskreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, her father, Graf Adalbert III von Calw, was 22 and her mother, Wiltrud von Niederlothringen, was 15. She married Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau in 1069, in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 17 July 1112, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wiltrude von Calw est née en 1045, à Eppstein, Obertaunuskreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Graf Adalbert III von Calw, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Wiltrud von Niederlothringen, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau en 1069, à Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1112, à Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wiltrude von Calw 1045 in Eppstein, Obertaunuskreis, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Adalbert III von Calw 22 und ihre Mutter Wiltrud von Niederlothringen 15. Sie hat 1069 in Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 17. Juli 1112 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

ko.lifeSummary: Wiltrude von Calw(이)가 1045년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 헤센-나소 오버타누스크레이스 프스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Adalbert III von Calw(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wiltrud von Niederlothringen(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1069년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈에서 Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1112년 7월 17일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레이스 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Hirsau, Calw, Calw, Baden-Württemberg, G: хирсау, калв, крис калв, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wiltrude von Calw родилась в 1045 г. в местности эппстин, обиртаунускрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Adalbert III von Calw было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Wiltrud von Niederlothringen, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau в 1069 г. в местности раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 17 июля 1112 г. в местности саарбрuккен, крис саарбрuккен, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 67 лет.
